sentiment: Sometimes the bravest thing is to close the inbox and let the world spin without you for a while.

stories.title: Curl will not accept vulnerability reports during July 2026
stories.summary: The curl project announces a 'summer of bliss' — pausing all vulnerability report processing for July 2026 so maintainers can rest, breathe, and enjoy summer.

stories.title: Your ePub Is fine
stories.summary: A perfectly valid ePub file gets rejected by Kobo e-readers due to Adobe's DRM validation layer — a story about standards that disagree with each other.

stories.title: Apple Foundation Models
stories.summary: Anthropic releases a Swift package making Claude available as a server-side language model in Apple's Foundation Models framework for iOS 27 and macOS 27.
